memberdef.name: QR
memberdef.initializer: do { \ a += b; d ^= a; d = rotl32(d, 16); \ c += d; b ^= c; b = rotl32(b, 12); \ a += b; d ^= a; d = rotl32(d, 8); \ c += d; b ^= c; b = rotl32(b, 7); \ } while (0)

briefdescription.para: Compute one ChaCha20 block into out (16 uint32_t).

memberdef.argsstring: (uint32_t state[16], const uint8_t key[32], const uint8_t nonce[12], uint32_t counter)
memberdef.name: chacha20_init

briefdescription.para: Set up the ChaCha20 initial state.

memberdef.argsstring: (const uint8_t key[32], const uint8_t nonce[12], uint32_t counter, uint8_t out[64])
memberdef.name: syn_chacha20_block

detaileddescription.para: Produces exactly 64 bytes of keystream for the given counter value.

memberdef.argsstring: (const uint8_t key[32], const uint8_t nonce[12], uint32_t counter, const uint8_t *in, size_t len, uint8_t *out)
memberdef.name: syn_chacha20_xor

detaileddescription.para: Encrypts (or decrypts — same operation) by XOR-ing with the ChaCha20 keystream starting at the given block counter.

briefdescription.para: Initialise Poly1305 from a 32-byte one-time key.

memberdef.argsstring: (Poly1305_Ctx *ctx, const uint8_t *data, size_t len, uint32_t hibit)
memberdef.name: poly1305_blocks

briefdescription.para: Absorb full 16-byte blocks into Poly1305 accumulator.

parameterdescription.para: Length in bytes (must be multiple of 16).
High bit to add (1<<24 for message, 0 for special uses).

briefdescription.para: Finalise Poly1305 and write the 16-byte MAC to mac.

memberdef.argsstring: (const uint8_t poly_key[32], const uint8_t *aad, size_t aad_len, const uint8_t *ct, size_t ct_len, uint8_t tag[16])
memberdef.name: aead_mac

briefdescription.para: Compute Poly1305 MAC over (aad || pad || ct || pad || len(aad) || len(ct)).

memberdef.argsstring: (const uint8_t key[32], const uint8_t nonce[12], const uint8_t *aad, size_t aad_len, const uint8_t *plaintext, size_t pt_len, uint8_t *ciphertext, uint8_t tag[16])
memberdef.name: syn_aead_encrypt

memberdef.argsstring: (const uint8_t key[32], const uint8_t nonce[12], const uint8_t *aad, size_t aad_len, const uint8_t *ciphertext, size_t ct_len, const uint8_t tag[16], uint8_t *plaintext)
memberdef.name: syn_aead_decrypt

simplesect.para: true if tag is valid and decryption succeeded.

detaileddescription.para: ChaCha20: add-rotate-xor stream cipher (pure 32-bit integer ops). Poly1305: one-time MAC using 130-bit arithmetic with 5 × 26-bit limbs. AEAD: combined construction per RFC 8439 §2.8.
